codeReview.summary: The fix removes the flagged modulo-based pseudo-unique fixture IDs from the same-workspace read-isolation helper and replaces them with a collision-safe generator that preserves the already-added read-surface proof while staying within the scoped determinism fix.

summary: Pass: commit 85806ff adequately addresses the prior fixture-determinism failure by removing the `time.Now().UnixNano() % ...` helper pattern from `security_regressions_test.go` and replacing it with a collision-safe ID path while leaving the accepted read-surface coverage scope intact. I found no new blocking or non-blocking issues in the scoped fix.
